sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQQUESTDOC (IDDOCQST NUMBER(10,0), IDQUEST NUMBER(10,0), DESCRICAO VARCHAR2(500), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQQUESTDOC PRIMARY KEY (IDDOCQST))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQQUESTDOC (IDDOCQST BIGINT, IDQUEST BIGINT, DESCRICAO VARCHAR(500), CONSTRAINT PK_TGQQUESTDOC PRIMARY KEY (IDDOCQST))

sql.oracle: CREATE TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC (IDLOG NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL, IDQUALIF NUMBER(10,0) NOT NULL, CODPARC NUMBER(10,0), TIPO_NOTIFICACAO VARCHAR2(30) NOT NULL, EMAIL_FORNEC VARCHAR2(255), EMAIL_EMPRESA VARCHAR2(255), DTNOTIF DATE NOT NULL, DHENVIO DATE, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQLOGNOTIFVENC PRIMARY KEY (IDLOG))
sql.mssql: CREATE TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC (IDLOG BIGINT NOT NULL, IDQUALIF BIGINT NOT NULL, CODPARC BIGINT, TIPO_NOTIFICACAO VARCHAR(30) NOT NULL, EMAIL_FORNEC VARCHAR(255), EMAIL_EMPRESA VARCHAR(255), DTNOTIF DATE NOT NULL, DHENVIO DATETIME, CONSTRAINT PK_TGQLOGNOTIFVENC PRIMARY KEY (IDLOG))

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC ADD CODPARC NUMBER(10,0)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC ADD CODPARC BIGINT

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC ADD EMAIL_FORNEC VARCHAR2(255)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC ADD EMAIL_FORNEC VARCHAR(255)

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC ADD EMAIL_EMPRESA VARCHAR2(255)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC ADD EMAIL_EMPRESA VARCHAR(255)

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC ADD TIPO_VENCIMENTO VARCHAR2(30)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC ADD TIPO_VENCIMENTO VARCHAR(30)

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC ADD IDREGISTRO NUMBER(10,0)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQLOGNOTIFVENC ADD IDREGISTRO BIGINT

sql.oracle: ALTER TABLE TGQARQQUESTFORN ADD DESCRICAOARQ VARCHAR2(500)
sql.mssql: ALTER TABLE TGQARQQUESTFORN ADD DESCRICAOARQ VARCHAR(500)
